title: Better Hud
description: A clean redesign of the default hud in-game
body:
## Better HUD  - [![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=%20Downloads&query=$.formatted&url=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinthuserdownloads.nicolaijesse.workers.dev%2Fastyll%3Fformat%3Dtrue&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&style=flat)](https://modrinth.com/user/astyll)

This resourcepack is a new redesign of the default minecraft hud. It's a modern darker variant with new icons, crosshair and bossbar.

This pack has new textures for:
- The crosshair
- The heart icons
- The food icons
- The armor icons
- The hotbar
- The experience bar
- The bossbars

[Clarity](https://modrinth.com/shader/clarityshader) was used when making the screenshots.
